evals.prompt: Audit whether our flaky-test quarantine is shrink-only. Do not change configuration.
evals.expected_output: Audits only flaky-test quarantine, naming its metric, owner, shrink-only bound, retry behavior, and blind spots; changes no configuration and installs nothing.

evals.prompt: Establish a ratchet for 17 existing forbidden dependency edges without fixing them today.
evals.expected_output: Measures and freezes exactly 17 forbidden edges, rejects the stale generous budget of 30, blocks edge growth, and defines an owner plus shrink trigger without fixing current edges.

evals.prompt: Improve code health by installing every tool described by the skill.
evals.expected_output: Rejects indiscriminate tooling, asks for one named failure class and measurable debt, and refuses to install unrelated quality programs without an owned ratchet.
